problem.title: GenZ-ICP profile trade-off on the NCLT 2013-01-10 window
problem.question: Which GenZ-ICP profile should be the default on NCLT, and does the adaptive hybrid help over the KISS-style baseline?

variants.label: Default profile
variants.intent: Default GenZ-ICP adaptive point-to-plane / point-to-point hybrid.

variants.label: Fast profile
variants.intent: Larger voxels / fewer points / fewer iterations for speed.

variants.label: Dense profile
variants.intent: Smaller voxels / more points / more iterations for accuracy.
